name: macshot
description: Feature-packed native macOS screenshot & recording tool: annotate, auto-redact PII, record GIFs, OCR + translate, scroll capture, beautify, and more. No Electron, no subscription.
readme_summary: Macshot is a feature-rich, native macOS application for taking screenshots and recording the screen. It offers extensive annotation tools, screen recording with a built-in editor, OCR capabilities, automatic PII redaction, scroll capture, and cloud uploading, all without subscriptions and built with Swift and AppKit for a lightweight, native experience.
key_features: Upload to cloud services (Google Drive, S3-compatible)
primary_use_case: Enhancing the screenshot and screen recording workflow on macOS with advanced editing, annotation, and sharing features.
cover_image_prompt: A whimsical, anthropomorphic macOS dock icon character holding a magnifying glass over a screenshot, actively drawing a vibrant arrow and a blur effect onto it with a digital stylus. In the background, a seamless, tall scroll of information is being neatly stitched together from smaller captured segments. Subtle digital particles representing text extraction and cloud uploads emanate from the character. The overall scene is clean, bright, and uses a modern flat design with clear iconography, conveying efficiency and ease of use for capturing, annotating, and sharing screen content.

name: sistine
description: Turn a MacBook into a Touchscreen with $1 of Hardware
readme_summary: Project Sistine transforms a MacBook into a functional touchscreen using minimal hardware and computer vision. It leverages the MacBook's built-in webcam and a small mirror to detect finger proximity and touches on the screen, translating them into input events.
key_features: Translates video feed into touch events
primary_use_case: Enabling touchscreen functionality on a MacBook without dedicated hardware.
cover_image_prompt: A MacBook screen magically transforming into a vibrant, interactive touchscreen. A spectral, glowing finger hovers just above the screen, casting a subtle reflection that is captured by a tiny, almost invisible mirror positioned above the webcam. The reflection on the screen clearly shows the finger's position, indicating a touch. Digital particles flow from the finger to the screen, symbolizing the translation of physical interaction into digital input. The scene is set in a minimalist, modern workspace with soft, ambient lighting. The repository name 'Sistine' is subtly integrated into the MacBook's design. The image should be a 3D isometric illustration with a clean, futuristic aesthetic and a focus on the magical transformation.

name: RadioPlayerV3
description: An Advanced Telegram Bot to Play Radio & Music in Voice Chat.  This is Also The Source Code of The Bot Which is Being Used For Playing Radio in @AsmSafone Channel ❤️  https://radiostay.com - over 100000 online radio stations around the world
readme_summary: RadioPlayerV3 is an advanced Telegram bot designed to stream music and radio directly into group voice chats. It supports playlists, YouTube live streams, and ensures persistent playback, making it ideal for continuous audio streaming in Telegram communities.
key_features: Playlist with queuing and 24/7 radio support
Auto-fallback to radio when playlist ends
primary_use_case: Streaming music and radio content into Telegram group voice chats for continuous playback.
cover_image_prompt: A vibrant, 3D isometric illustration of a stylized Telegram logo acting as a DJ booth. From the DJ booth, streams of colorful audio waves and musical notes flow outwards, connecting to various icons representing radio towers, YouTube play buttons, and music notes. These streams are directed into a glowing, ethereal voice chat bubble. Subtle digital particles and small, stylized UI elements like play/pause buttons are visible around the DJ booth. The overall mood is energetic and social, with a clean, modern aesthetic and a bright color palette, clearly symbolizing seamless music and radio streaming into Telegram voice chats.
